subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant whom the heat of Thy love hath seized and the raptures of Thy divine passion have overtaken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذا عبدک الذی اخذه حرارت حبک و جذبات عشقک و هبت علیه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
